primary_official_source.name: EUR-Lex — Official Journal of the European Union

upcoming: CEN-CENELEC harmonized standard for Art. 11 (expected Q4 2026)

obligations.source_quote: The technical documentation of a high-risk AI system shall be drawn up before that system is placed on the market or put into service and shall be kept up-to date.

decomposed_atoms.requirement: Technical documentation SHALL be drawn up
Documentation SHALL be drawn up BEFORE placing on market or putting into service

obligations.source_quote: The technical documentation shall be drawn up in such a way as to demonstrate that the high-risk AI system complies with the requirements set out in this Section and to provide national competent authorities and notified bodies with the necessary information in a clear and comprehensive form to assess the compliance of the AI system with those requirements.

decomposed_atoms.requirement: Documentation SHALL demonstrate compliance with Section requirements

decomposed_atoms.description: Documentation must be clear and comprehensive
decomposed_atoms.requirement: Documentation SHALL provide information in a clear and comprehensive form
Documentation SHALL enable national authorities and notified bodies to assess compliance

obligations.source_quote: It shall contain, at a minimum, the elements set out in Annex IV.

decomposed_atoms.description: Documentation must contain Annex IV elements
decomposed_atoms.requirement: Documentation SHALL contain at minimum all elements set out in Annex IV
SHALL include intended purpose, developer identity, system version
SHALL include design specifications, architecture, algorithms, data requirements
SHALL include monitoring description, testing procedures and metrics

decomposed_atoms.description: Annex IV(5-8): Risk, changes, standards, declaration
decomposed_atoms.requirement: SHALL include risk management, modification history, standards applied

obligations.source_quote: SMEs, including start-ups, may provide the elements of the technical documentation specified in Annex IV in a simplified manner.
obligations.scope_limitation: Only applies to SMEs and start-ups
obligations.note: SME simplification permission — SMEs are not required to use the full Annex IV format. If is_sme=false, this permission is not applicable to the project.

decomposed_atoms.description: SMEs may use simplified technical documentation
decomposed_atoms.requirement: SMEs and start-ups MAY provide Annex IV technical documentation in a simplified manner

obligations.source_quote: To that end, the Commission shall establish a simplified technical documentation form targeted at the needs of small and microenterprises.
obligations.note: Commission obligation to establish an SME-friendly simplified documentation form. NOT a provider obligation — included for completeness so providers know the form should exist.

decomposed_atoms.description: Commission must create simplified documentation form
decomposed_atoms.requirement: The Commission SHALL establish a simplified technical documentation form targeted at small and microenterprises

obligations.source_quote: Where an SME, including a start-up, opts to provide the information required in Annex IV in a simplified manner, it shall use the form referred to in this paragraph.
obligations.scope_limitation: Only applies to SMEs and start-ups that opt to use simplified documentation

decomposed_atoms.description: SMEs opting for simplified documentation must use the official Commission form
decomposed_atoms.requirement: Where an SME opts for simplified Annex IV documentation, it SHALL use the Commission form

obligations.source_quote: Notified bodies shall accept the form for the purposes of the conformity assessment.
obligations.note: Obligation on notified bodies (not providers) to accept the simplified SME form. Included so providers know: notified bodies cannot lawfully reject a compliant simplified form.

decomposed_atoms.description: Notified bodies must accept simplified form
decomposed_atoms.requirement: Notified bodies SHALL accept the simplified SME form for conformity assessment purposes

obligations.source_quote: Where a high-risk AI system related to a product covered by the Union harmonisation legislation listed in Section A of Annex I is placed on the market or put into service, a single set of technical documentation shall be drawn up containing all the information set out in paragraph 1, as well as the information required under those legal acts.
obligations.scope_limitation: Only applies to products covered by Union harmonisation legislation (Annex I, Section A)

decomposed_atoms.description: Single combined documentation for Annex I products
decomposed_atoms.requirement: A single set of technical documentation SHALL be drawn up combining Art. 11 and applicable Union harmonisation legislation requirements

obligations.source_quote: The Commission is empowered to adopt delegated acts in accordance with Article 97 in order to amend Annex IV, where necessary, to ensure that, in light of technical progress, the technical documentation provides all the information necessary to assess the compliance of the system with the requirements set out in this Section.
obligations.note: Commission empowerment to amend Annex IV. Not a provider obligation.

decomposed_atoms.requirement: The Commission is empowered to adopt delegated acts to amend Annex IV

scope_notes.general_obligations: ART11-OBL-1, ART11-OBL-1b, ART11-OBL-1c — apply to ALL high-risk AI systems
scope_notes.sme_provisions: ART11-PERM-1d, ART11-OBL-1f — only for SMEs and start-ups (context_skip_field: is_sme)
scope_notes.commission_obligations: ART11-OBL-1e — Commission SHALL establish simplified form; ART11-EMP-3 — Commission empowered to amend Annex IV
scope_notes.notified_body: ART11-OBL-1g — notified bodies SHALL accept the simplified SME form
scope_notes.conditional: ART11-OBL-2 — only for Annex I products
scope_notes.empowerment: ART11-EMP-3 — Commission power, not provider obligation
